query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-25 the exact saved New Hampshire DHHS replacement-host root used for statewide Medicaid evidence.
blocker_evidence: Reviewed 2026-06-26 one more bounded live New Hampshire DHHS host-family pass. `https://www.dhhs.nh.gov/`, `https://dhhs.nh.gov/`, and `https://www.nh.gov/dhhs/` all still return the same public HTTP 403 `Access Denied` shell rather than any reviewable public DHHS content. The public robots lanes remain readable only: `https://www.nh.gov/robots.txt` and `https://www.dhhs.nh.gov/robots.txt` still return HTTP 200 text files, but they do not restore any local-routing, Medicaid, DD, EI, or county-local contract. New Hampshire therefore still lacks a reviewable public DHHS lane for the blocked health, DD, EI, waiver, and county-local families.
